name: Buttermilk Bran Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Mix cereal and buttermilk in a small bowl; let stand for 5 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and baking soda.
4. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
5. Stir in the cereal mixture just until a soft dough forms.
6. Turn off heat source.
7. Knead dough on lightly floured surface until smooth.
8. Roll dough to a 12x4-inch rectangle.
9. Cut into 4-inch squares, then cut each square into 4 triangles.
10. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
11. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until golden brown. Serve warm.
